highlights.description: Public API types for external package integration
Multi-provider LLM support via omnillm-core in examples
Custom LLM backend examples for Tavus integration

breaking.description: API types moved from `internal/api` to `api` - import path changed

added.description: Custom LLM backend example showing PAL configuration with external LLM

changed.description: Custom LLM server example now uses omnillm-core for multi-provider support (OpenAI, Anthropic, X.AI, Ollama, etc.)

refactored.description: Moved ogen-generated API types from `internal/api` to `api` for external package access

highlights.description: Initial release of Go SDK for Tavus API with full CVI (Conversational Video Interface) support
Spec-driven development using OpenAPI 3.0.3 and ogen code generation
High-level service wrappers for all 10 Tavus resource types

added.description: Comprehensive OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec covering all Tavus API v2 endpoints
ogen-generated API client with type-safe request/response handling
SDK client wrapper with functional options (API key, base URL, timeout, HTTP client)
Usage examples: basic conversation, PAL management, tool calling, resource listing

build.description: ogen code generation tooling with `generate.sh` script
Post-processing with ogen-fixnull and ogen-fixerror from plexusone/ogen-tools

tests.description: Unit tests for client construction, options, and service accessors
Integration tests for all 10 services (skips gracefully without `TAVUS_API_KEY`)

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, and all service examples
